category.name: System Design
category.description: Architecture deep dives, scaling trade-offs, reliability patterns, and system design walkthroughs for backend engineers.
category.seoDescription: Practical system design articles on distributed systems, reliability, scalability, rate limiting, audit logs, multi-region architecture, and backend architecture trade-offs.

posts.title: System Design: Building a Distributed Tracing Platform
posts.description: Design a production distributed tracing platform with trace ingestion, context propagation, sampling, span storage, trace query, retention, tenant isolation, and cost controls.
posts.excerpt: Metrics tell you that latency is bad. Logs tell you that something failed somewhere. Traces tell you which request went where, in what order, and where the time actually disappeared. That is why tracing becomes essential…
